topic: Replit Agent Review 2026: Honest Assessment After Testing

competitors.title: Replit Agent Review 2026: Comprehensive AI Coding Assistant
key_points: Covers V2 features including autonomous debugging, checkpoint system, and real-time preview
Compares Replit Agent vs Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and Lovable across multiple dimensions
Details pricing tiers: Free (100 credits/mo), Core ($20/mo, 1000 credits), Pro ($40/mo, 3000 credits), Enterprise (custom)
Credits do not roll over between billing periods
Lists limitations: slower iteration on design changes, occasional hallucinations in complex code, data persistence issues
Provides use case recommendations: best for full-stack web apps, prototyping, and learning

competitors.title: Replit Review 2026: AI App Builder Tested
key_points: Hands-on test building a recipe tracking app from scratch with Replit Agent V2
Checkpoint system allows rollback to previous versions during AI development
Autonomous error detection and debugging without requiring user input
Dark mode implementation test revealed data persistence issues and design quality regression
Side-by-side comparison: Bolt and Lovable offer faster prototyping; Replit takes a more autonomous build-first approach
Conclusion: Replit shows promise but not yet ready to overtake Bolt/Lovable for rapid prototyping

competitors.title: Replit Agent Statistics: Benchmarks, Usage, and Satisfaction Data (2026)
key_points: 1.2M monthly active users, 450K apps deployed in first month of V2 launch, 250K daily active sessions
2.3M code generations per day, 78% daily return rate, 65% weekly usage
1,200 enterprises using Replit Agent, 22% increase in Pro plan upgrades since V2
SWE-bench Verified: 28.5%, HumanEval Python: 41%, MultiPL-E: 67%, ReplitBench internal: 92%
NPS score 74, 89% of users rate it 'very helpful', CSAT 4.6/5, feature satisfaction 4.7/5
3.2x faster than manual coding, 47s average deployment time, code completion latency 1.8s
99.7% uptime over 30 days, outperforms Cursor by 15% on SWE-bench, 2x faster than Copilot for full app builds
